flashcards.definition: A sentence that is either true or false, but not both.
The opposite of a statement; denoted ¬p or ~p.
A compound statement using 'and' (p ∧ q); true only if both parts are true.
A compound statement using 'or' (p ∨ q); true if at least one part is true.
A table showing all possible truth values for a logical expression.
